015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.prototext.*;
020
021/**
022 * A pairing of a {@link PrototextSerializer} and {@link PrototextParser} into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 *    The general idea is to combine a single serializer and parser inside a simplified API for serializing and parsing POJOs.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='figure'>Examples:</h5>
028 * <p class='bjava'>
029 *    <jc>// Using instance.</jc>
030 *    Prototext <jv>proto</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Prototext();
031 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = <jv>proto</jv>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
032 *    String <jv>string</jv> = <jv>proto</jv>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
033 * </p>
034 * <p class='bjava'>
035 * <jc>// Using DEFAULT instance.</jc>
036 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = Prototext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
037 *    String <jv>string</jv> = Prototext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
038 * </p>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (Map of name/age):</h5>
041 * <p class='bcode'>
042 *    name: "Alice"
043 *    age: 30
044 * </p>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested object + array):</h5>
047 * <p class='bcode'>
048 *    name: "Alice"
049 *    age: 30
050 *    address {
051 *      street: "123 Main St"
052 *      city: "Boston"
053 *      state: "MA"
054 *    }
055 *    tags: ["a", "b", "c"]
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Marshallers">Marshallers</a>
060 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ProtobufBasics">Protobuf Text Format Basics</a>
061 * </ul>
062 */
063public class Prototext extends CharMarshaller {
064
065   /** Default marshaller instance. */
066   public static final Prototext DEFAULT = new Prototext();
067
068   /** Creates using default serializer and parser. */
069   public Prototext() {
070      this(PrototextSerializer.DEFAULT, PrototextParser.DEFAULT);
071   }
072
073   /**
074    * Creates with custom serializer and parser.
075    *
076    * @param s The serializer.
077    * @param p The parser.
078    */
079   public Prototext(PrototextSerializer s, PrototextParser p) {
080      super(s, p);
081   }
082}
